name: Caligula
overview: "Caligula" is a psychological phenomenon in which you want do things that are prohibited. Featured here are numerous pitches rejected by multiple TV stations. However, there are some treasures buried among them. Proposals once buried in the darkness revived here!

trailers.title: 『今田×東野のカリギュラ』特報 | Amazon プライム・ビデオ_30s
